message:
fix(async_eval): suppress unused import warning, fix borrow-after-mutate in settle/notify, and tighten filter pattern

Three correctness fixes in module_async_evaluation:

- Suppress unused ModuleStatus import warning by aliasing as _ (the
  type is used only for documentation context, not code)
- In settle_and_notify_dependents, capture suspension count before
  emitting the event to avoid borrowing state after it was mutated
  by settle(). Similarly in notify_dependents_of_settlement, capture
  all_dependencies_settled() before emitting event to avoid stale reads
- Tighten the filter closure pattern in compute_async_evaluation_order
  from |(_, &deg)| to |&(_, &deg)| for correct reference binding

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
